caption: Table 134. Document revision history
rows: Added reference to errata sheet ES0392 in Section 1: Introduction. Figure 1: STM32H750xB block diagram: changed APB1 and APB2 maximum frequency to 120 MHz, and WKUP[5:0] to WKUP[6:1]. Updated Figure 5: STM32H747xI/G bus matrix. Removed note to Section 3.5.3: Voltage regulator (SMPS step-down converter and LDO) Updated Section 3.24: Digital camera interface (DCMI) (modified supported format) Updated Figure 13: Power supply scheme (Backup domain and VDD domain blocks) Swapped 158 and 159 pin positions in Table 8: LQFP176 pinout on page 58 Added Full-duplex mode in Section 3.34: Serial peripheral interfaces (SPI)/integrated interchip sound interfaces (I2S). Updated number of microphones that can be supported by the SAI in Section 3.35: Serial audio interfaces (SAI). Removed FDCAN1_RXFD_MODE, FDCAN1_TXFD_MODE, FDCAN2_RXFD_MODE and FDCAN2_TXFD_MODE functions from Table 8: STM32H750xB pin/ball definition and all alternate function tables. Additional modifications made on Table 8: STM32H750xB pin/ball definition: Added note to VDD50USB. Added note to PB12 and PB13. Change PB1 I/O structure to TT_A. Replaced PI8 WKUP3 additional function by WKUP2 Replaced PC13 WKUP2 additional function by WKUP3 Modified Table 58: EMI characteristics for fHSE = 8 MHz and fCPU = 400 MHz Updated Section 6.2: Absolute maximum ratings introduction to device mission profile. Modified text in Section : I/O static current consumption Changed f to 100 MHz in Table 13: General operating conditions. CPU2 Replaced Min V by Min V in Table 14: Supply voltage and DD DDLDO maximum frequency configuration. Removed note 1 from Table 33: Typical and maximum current consumption in Stop, LDO regulator ON and Table 35: Typical and maximum current consumption in Sleep mode, LDO regulator. Updated Table 41: High-speed external user clock characteristics. Updated U min value in Table 51: MIPI D-PHY characteristics on INST page 144 In Table 55: Flash memory programming: removed reference to single bank configuration in title and added t typical and maximum ERASE128KB values. Changed I to I in Table 62: I/O static characteristics leak lkg

Added reference to AN4899 in Section 6.3.18: I/O port characteristics. In Table 66: Output timing characteristics (HSLV ON): modified conditions for t/t values (speeds 10 and 11) and F value r f max (speed 11) changed capacitance value for speed 10 and t/t, and speed for 11 and r f t/t/F Table 66: Output timing characteristics (HSLV ON). r f max Updated t /t and t t in su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) Table 76: Synchronous multiplexed NOR/PSRAM read timings. Changed t to t and updated t /t and (NWAIT-CLKH) su(NWAIT-CLKH) su(DV-CLKH) h(DV-CLKH) t t in Table 78: Synchronous non-multiplexed su(NWAIT-CLKH)/h(NWAIT-CLKH) NOR/PSRAM read timings. Updated t and t su(SDCLKH _Data) h(SDCLKH _Data) in Table 82: SDRAM read timings and Table 83: LPSDR SDRAM read timings. Replaced FMC_CLK by FMC_SDCLK in Section : SDRAM waveforms and timings. Updated t and t in Table 86: QUADSPI characteristics in SDR s(IN) h(IN) mode and t /t and t /t in Table 87: QUADSPI sr(IN) sf(IN) hr(IN) hf(IN) characteristics in DDR mode. Added reference to AN5354 application note in note of Table 89: ADC characteristics. Updated Figure 42: ADC accuracy characteristics and Figure 43: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function. Changed V maximum value to V -0.2 in Table 93: DAC DAC_OUT REF+ accuracy. Updated T maximum value in Table 95: Temperature sensor L characteristics Changed temperature condition to 130 °C for TS_CAL2 in Table 96: Temperature sensor calibration values Updated DuCy in Table 103: DFSDM measured timing - 1.62-3.6 V. CKOUT Updated Figure 51: USART timing diagram in SPI master mode and Figure 52: USART timing diagram in SPI slave mode. Updated Table 11: Current characteristics Updated t and t in Table 110: SPI dynamic characteristics. su(MI) h(MI) Updated t t , t , t and t in Table 114: Dynamics ISU, IH ISUD IHD OH characteristics: SD / MMC characteristics, VDD = 2.7 to 3.6 V Updated t t in Table 115: Dynamics characteristics: eMMC ISU, IH characteristics VDD = 1.71V to 1.9V. Added Section : USB OTG_FS characteristics. Updated Table 117: Dynamics characteristics: USB ULPI Added Section 7.1: Device marking (device marking information removed from package sections and moved to this section) Added Figure 82: UFBGA169 - Footprint example and Table 140: UFBGA169 - Example of PCB design rules (0.5 mm pitch BGA). Added note related to the availability of tape and reel packing in Section 8: Ordering information. Updated Figure 81: UFBGA169 - Outline, Section 7.9: LQFP176 package information (1T), Figure 83: LQFP208 marking example (package top view) and Section 7.13: TFBGA240+25 package information.

Modified title for footprint figures and PCB design rules tables (examples instead of recommendations) Updated Figure 43: Typical connection diagram when using the ADC with FT/TT pins featuring analog switch function Updated information on pin count in Section 8: Ordering information Added Section 9: Important security notice.

In the context of I2C, replaced master and slave by controller and target, respectively. Updated features on cover page. Updated Section 1: Introduction. Updated Table 2: STM32H747xI/G features and peripheral counts. Updated Figure 1: STM32H747xI/G block diagram. Updated Section 3.4: Boot modes. Updated Figure 6: WLCSP156 ballout. Updated Table 7: Legend/abbreviations used in the pinout table. Updated Table 8: STM32H747xI/G pin/ball definition. Updated Table 9: Alternate functions. Updated Figure 13: Power supply scheme. Updated Table 13: General operating conditions. Updated Table 15: VCAP operating conditions. Updated Figure 16: External components for SMPS step-down converter. Updated Table 39: Peripheral current consumption in Run mode. Updated Section : Low-speed external user clock generated from an external source. Updated Figure 23: Typical application with an 8 MHz crystal. Updated Table 62: I/O static characteristics. Updated Figure 42: ADC accuracy characteristics. Updated Table 89: ADC characteristics. Updated Table 95: Temperature sensor characteristics. Updated Table 96: Temperature sensor calibration values. Updated Section : I2C interface characteristics. Updated Table 127: LQFP176 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 128: LQFP208 - Mechanical data. Updated Table 132: TFBGA240+25 - Example of PCB design rules.
